rows.source_ref: sylc (OP) with replies from chesterjohn, 'Want to convert strategy to MT5 EA', Babypips forum, 2023, https://forums.babypips.com/t/want-to-convert-strategy-to-mt5-ea/1152145
rows.concept: Long/short trend-following on a fast+slow Supertrend flip aligned with EMA slope, RSI momentum and an ADX strength filter.
rows.eligibility_reason: Deterministic pure-indicator rules with all params stated (Supertrend 7/0.9 + 7/1.8, EMA, RSI9>50/<50, ADX9>25); implementable in MQL5, no ML/external runtime; Supertrend must be hand-coded from ATR.
rows.notes: Generic retail indicator-confluence trend follower with no uncorrelated return driver; author admits it is untested and replier notes 'not a system until there's evidence'. Text says EMA(99) but the posted code uses EMA period 9 (ambiguous — treat EMA length as a param to sweep). 'RSA(9)' is a typo for RSI(9). Symbol and timeframe are unspecified in the thread (market=FX and TF=H1 are placeholders for a symbol-agnostic trend system). Stop-loss defined at the Supertrend(7,0.9)/(7,1.8) level. Thread also contains an off-topic tangent on order-block trading (no rules stated) — not a candidate.
